Core coverage

Four pillars, one system

01

Free AI Tools

Track what is genuinely usable, what turns fake-free halfway through the workflow, and which alternatives stay useful without hidden choke points.

See tool guides →
02

Content Workflows

Build better creator pipelines around video, social output, editing systems, and repeatable production processes that do not waste motion or time.

See workflow posts →
03

Automation Productivity

Use lightweight automations, scripts, and process logic to remove friction from repetitive technical work without turning everything into enterprise bloat.

See automation posts →
04

LMS Training Systems

Combine instructional design, Moodle administration, reporting, media, and process structure to improve how training is delivered at scale.

See systems profile →

Aux / Auxilium

Why this exists

Build around control, not confusion
